extraction.one_line_summary: GROVES Kaden won Stage 5 sprint with perfect Alpecin leadout after Sepulveda solo-bridged 1-minute gap mid-climb to protect KOM jersey.
tactical_patterns: Sepulveda solo-bridged 1-minute gap on category 2 climb rather than letting peloton catch breakaway, revealing aggressive KOM defense
Alpecin still had two leadout riders with 200m remaining through technical finale, luxury no other sprint team matched
Evenepoel extending GC advantage on flat stages (6 seconds today), suggesting rivals conceding time before mountain stages

rider_signals.SEPULVEDA Eduardo: positive: willing to spend significant energy solo-bridging mid-race for 5 KOM points, showing jersey defense priority over stage positioning
rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: positive: casual shoulder check at 200m with two leadout men remaining shows confidence in sprint superiority and team depth
rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: positive: nearly caught Groves post-line despite no leadout, revealing raw power threatens even perfectly executed trains
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: negative: already 43 seconds down after only 300 yards hard racing (Andorra climb), concerning early deficit for GC contender
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: negative: matching Vingegaard's 43-second deficit without any documented difficulty suggests tactical passivity or fitness concerns
